title: Player Pronouns
body:
_Yes I am good at icons_

# Let players share their pronouns!

**Note: this mod requires another mod to be installed in order to display pronouns in-game. Some example screenshots are shown below, while full configuration options and other information is included in [the README](https://github.com/ashhhleyyy/player-pronouns#readme).**

## In chat with [Styled Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/styled-chat)

[Configuration](https://github.com/ashhhleyyy/player-pronouns?tab=readme-ov-file#in-chat-with-styled-chat)

![](https://cdn.ashhhleyyy.dev/file/ashs-magic-bucket/player-pronouns/in-chat.png)

## On the tab list with [Styled Player List](https://modrinth.com/mod/styledplayerlist)

[Configuration](https://github.com/ashhhleyyy/player-pronouns?tab=readme-ov-file#on-the-tab-list-with-styled-player-list)

![](https://cdn.ashhhleyyy.dev/file/ashs-magic-bucket/player-pronouns/2021-07-30_19.45.49.png)
